message:
feat(runtime): add OTEL tracing spans to Program event loop

Instrument the main Program loop with detailed tracing spans:

ftui.program.init:
- Track command count from model initialization

ftui.program.update:
- Record msg_type (Tick, event, subscription)
- Measure duration_us for performance analysis
- Capture cmd_type for command flow tracing

ftui.program.subscriptions:
- Track active_count, started, stopped counts
- Enable subscription lifecycle observability

This enables OTEL-based performance profiling and debugging of
TUI applications without modifying user code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
